entries.definition:
r–j–j the dregs of society, the dregs in a drinking trough; to
shake, to agitate, to rouse, (of the sea) to become tumultuous,
turmoil, commotion, excitement, the sound of thunder. Of this
root, two forms occur once each in the Qur’an: رُجَّت rujjia and رَجّ
rajj.

348
